{
  "1:LEN": {

  "7:LEN": [
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"mini_celery package.\"\"\"\n\n__all__ = [\"__version__\"]\n\n__version__ = \"0.1.0\"\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "567cbac2843985e1898f34e29d5eb02c9994f7cd5aff49873829c875cf6a1d76",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom collections.abc import Iterator\nfrom contextlib import contextmanager\nfrom typing import Any\n\nfrom sqlalchemy import create_engine, event, text\nfrom sqlalchemy.engine import Engine\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Session, sessionmaker\n\nfrom mini_celery.config import Settings, get_settings\nfrom mini_celery.models import Base\n\n\nclass Database:\n    def __init__(self, database_url: str):\n        connect_args: dict[str, object] = {}\n        if database_url.startswith(\"sqlite\"):\n            connect_args = {\"check_same_thread\": False}\n\n        self.engine = create_engine(database_url, connect_args=connect_args, future=True)\n        self.SessionLocal = sessionmaker(\n            bind=self.engine,\n            class_=Session,\n            autocommit=False,\n            autoflush=False,\n            expire_on_commit=False,\n        )\n\n        if database_url.startswith(\"sqlite\"):\n\n            @event.listens_for(self.engine, \"connect\")\n            def _set_sqlite_pragma(dbapi_connection: Any, _: object) -> None:\n                cursor = dbapi_connection.cursor()\n                cursor.execute(\"PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL;\")\n                cursor.execute(\"PRAGMA busy_timeout=5000;\")\n                cursor.execute(\"PRAGMA foreign_keys=ON;\")\n                cursor.close()\n\n    def init(self) -> None:\n        Base.metadata.create_all(bind=self.engine)\n\n    @contextmanager\n    def session(self) -> Iterator[Session]:\n        session = self.SessionLocal()\n        try:\n            yield session\n            session.commit()\n        except Exception:\n            session.rollback()\n            raise\n        finally:\n            session.close()\n\n    def check(self) -> bool:\n        with self.session() as session:\n            session.execute(text(\"SELECT 1\"))\n        return True\n\n\n_default_settings: Settings = get_settings()\ndefault_db = Database(_default_settings.database_url)\n\n\ndef get_db() -> Database:\n    return default_db\n\n\ndef get_engine() -> Engine:\n    return default_db.engine\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "82c0f01b7c49fc35a0998e65ab931a615d932024ba5197bc06e4a8d4852ecf00",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport json\nimport logging\nfrom datetime import UTC, datetime\nfrom typing import Any\n\n\nclass JsonLogFormatter(logging.Formatter):\n    def format(self, record: logging.LogRecord) -> str:\n        base: dict[str, Any] = {\n            \"ts\": datetime.now(UTC).isoformat(),\n            \"level\": record.levelname,\n            \"logger\": record.name,\n            \"message\": record.getMessage(),\n        }\n\n        if record.exc_info:\n            base[\"exc_info\"] = self.formatException(record.exc_info)\n\n        standard = {\n            \"name\",\n            \"msg\",\n            \"args\",\n            \"levelname\",\n            \"levelno\",\n            \"pathname\",\n            \"filename\",\n            \"module\",\n            \"exc_info\",\n            \"exc_text\",\n            \"stack_info\",\n            \"lineno\",\n            \"funcName\",\n            \"created\",\n            \"msecs\",\n            \"relativeCreated\",\n            \"thread\",\n            \"threadName\",\n            \"processName\",\n            \"process\",\n            \"taskName\",\n        }\n        for key, value in record.__dict__.items():\n            if key not in standard and not key.startswith(\"_\"):\n                base[key] = value\n\n        return json.dumps(base, default=str)\n\n\ndef setup_logging(level: str = \"INFO\") -> None:\n    root = logging.getLogger()\n    root.setLevel(level.upper())\n    handler = logging.StreamHandler()\n    handler.setFormatter(JsonLogFormatter())\n    root.handlers.clear()\n    root.addHandler(handler)\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "2b7d0de56d90704ce6fba4c0c6b6bf754d67eee628465aaa36b0d6780bd938a4",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom functools import lru_cache\n\nfrom pydantic import Field\nfrom pydantic_settings import BaseSettings, SettingsConfigDict\n\n\nclass Settings(BaseSettings):\n    model_config = SettingsConfigDict(env_file=\".env\", extra=\"ignore\")\n\n    app_name: str = \"mini-celery\"\n    log_level: str = \"INFO\"\n\n    database_url: str = \"sqlite:///REDACTED\"\n    redis_url: str = \"redis://localhost:6379/0\"\n\n    stream_prefix: str = \"jobs\"\n    consumer_group: str = \"workers\"\n    default_queue: str = \"default\"\n    worker_queues: str = \"default\"\n\n    worker_concurrency: int = 4\n    visibility_timeout_sec: int = 30\n    reclaim_interval_sec: int = 5\n\n    scheduler_poll_interval_sec: float = 1.0\n    scheduler_config_path: str = \"config/schedules.yaml\"\n\n    retry_base_delay_sec: float = 1.0\n    retry_multiplier: float = 2.0\n    retry_cap_delay_sec: float = 30.0\n    retry_jitter_ratio: float = 0.2\n\n    api_url: str = Field(default=\"http://localhost:8000\", alias=\"API_URL\")\n\n    def stream_name(self, queue: str) -> str:\n        return f\"{self.stream_prefix}:{queue}\"\n\n    @property\n    def dlq_stream_name(self) -> str:\n        return f\"{self.stream_prefix}:dlq\"\n\n    @property\n    def queues(self) -> list[str]:\n        return [q.strip() for q in self.worker_queues.split(\",\") if q.strip()]\n\n\n@lru_cache(maxsize=1)\ndef get_settings() -> Settings:\n    return Settings()\n\n\ndef reset_settings_cache() -> None:\n    get_settings.cache_clear()\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "fbf010d79011ed5e48cd56743bafb672ce3f119cb50934ebff62148c7877b6ac",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    }
  ]
}
